title: Dashboard widget - Filter
excerpt:
Hi, 
I can’t find this filter feature in our own developed Custom Dashboard Widget. 
May I know is this feature available in Custom Dashboard widget? 
  
Thanks 
Br, YH

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see, I understood this is a custom widget, but wanted to verify if the filter did not show up on the settings. I think you should contact monday support to ask, or perhaps @BiancaT can shed some light on this.

Unfortunately I am not accustomed with custom widgets, and I am also very interested learn from this!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @yarhuoy,

This is not possible as of today.

Having said that, it is likely to happen in the future (no ETAs for now).

If that happens, you will see an announcement in our changelog

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
